prompt: Integration check across 8 subsidiary plans for a new project.
assertions: checks consistency between each plan pair

prompt: Schedule slipped 3 weeks on critical path. Propagate impact to all plans.
assertions: traces cascade from schedule to resource, budget, risk plans

prompt: Budget allocates $200K for a role not in the resource plan. Resolve.
assertions: traces root cause to determine correct plan

prompt: Build integrated dashboard for 12 subsidiary plans showing cross-plan health.
assertions: generates executive narrative with attention items
